title: castilleja auriculata var. auriculata
intro: Castilleja auriculata var. auriculata, also known as the yellow Indian paintbrush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. It is a hemiparasitic plant, obtaining some of its nutrients by tapping into the roots of other plants. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Castilleja auriculata var. auriculata include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, and it can be prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal use.
